Phase-2.NAME: Runtime synchronization and DNS binding
Phase-2.goal: Make policy changes apply incrementally and track domain-to-IP bindings with TTL awareness.
Phase-2.step-1: M-017: Extend runtime sync for incremental host-level updates instead of full resets.
Phase-2.step-2: M-015: Add DNS observer with bounded cache and TTL-driven expiry/refresh.
Phase-2.step-3: M-013/M-015/M-017: Add structured decision logging for every policy branch.
Phase-2.data-flows: DF-002 (DNS binding to runtime route set)
